description: This engineering schematic is used for the Engineering profession. It is looted from Spectral Charger. In the Engineering Schematics category.
name: Schematic: Mana Potion Injector

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Schematic: Mana Potion Injector Item Level 69 Requires Engineering (345) Use: Teaches you how to make a Mana Potion Injector. Sell Price: 2 Mana Potion Injector Item Level 69 Requires Level 55 Use: Restores 1800 to 3000 mana. (2 Min Cooldown) Max Stack: 20 Sell Price: 50 Requires Fel Iron Casing , Handful of Fel Iron Bolts , Knothide Leather (2), Super Mana Potion (20) This engineering schematic is used for the Engineering profession. It is looted from Spectral Charger. In the Engineering Schematics category.
